description: Atlan fleet upgrade policy for atlan-*-app repos. Extend via: {"extends": ["github>atlanhq/application-sdk//renovate-config/default.json"]}

lockFileMaintenance.description: Python in-range deps: refresh uv.lock without touching pyproject.toml; auto-merge on green.

packageRules.description: SDK: disable major bumps — these are opt-in manual migrations.
app-contract-toolkit (Pkl): minor+patch in one PR; auto-merge on green. Matched by the regex customManager below.

GitHub Actions: group all update types (including major) in one PR; auto-merge on green. Major action bumps are safe to auto-merge because the auto-approval workflow gates on green CI, which validates behaviour. Unlike Python deps, action majors are frequent and low-risk compared to library API changes.

Trivy CLI version (version: in with: blocks): disable auto-updates. The scanner version is pinned deliberately — scan results drift when Trivy's vuln DB schema or detection logic changes, so bumps must be a conscious decision.

customManagers.description: Pkl app-contract-toolkit: track the @<version> URI pinned in contract/PklProject. Uses github-tags datasource against atlanhq/application-sdk, filtering to contract-toolkit-v* tags.
